pr.title: Record: 11L XSA4 + EMA + Batch524K + zstd fallback (val_bpb: 1.1357)

output.summary: 11-layer int6 MLP3x stacks XSA on final layers with EMA plus SmearGate/BigramHash, torch.compile, and SDPA/zstd fallbacks for robust 16MB export.
techniques: 11-layer int6 MLP3x with XSA4, EMA, and SmearGate/BigramHash
524K token fixed-batch training with torch.compile for faster steps
SDPA and zstd fallbacks keep int6 export runnable under 16MB
